SUPER_APOTHEOSIS.title: Super Apotheosis
SUPER_APOTHEOSIS.description: Upgrade all cards in your hand for the rest of combat. Also upgrade all cards in your deck.{Exhaust:showExhaustTooltip}
FLEXIBLE_POWER.title: Blank Ability Card
FLEXIBLE_POWER.description: Execute all stored abilities from local save data.{Innate:showInnateTooltip}
